goals.objective: Create the canonical integration intake contract using existing work_items.
acceptance_criteria: Dry-run import returns normalized source, risk class, recommended loop and metadata.integration with zero writes.
Apply writes or updates one work_items row by source and source_ref.
No goal, loop run or worker lease is created by intake alone.

goals.objective: Wire GitHub issue import into the shared integration inbox.
acceptance_criteria: Imported GitHub issue becomes an idempotent work_item.
Existing GitHub co-creation tests still pass.
GitHub source metadata is visible in the work item metadata.

goals.objective: Wire Telegram command events into the shared integration inbox.
acceptance_criteria: Telegram command preview creates no writes.
Telegram command apply creates or updates a work_item.
Telegram command import does not start workers.

goals.objective: Convert MCP and OKF drift into actionable work_items.
acceptance_criteria: MCP drift recommends mcp-connector-validation-loop.
OKF drift recommends the appropriate knowledge or capability-sync loop.
Drift imports preserve blocked reasons in metadata.integration.

goals.objective: Turn a selected integration-origin work item into goal, loop and prepared maker/checker leases.
acceptance_criteria: Selected work item links to a goal and loop run.
Maker and checker leases are prepared and linked to source work item metadata.
No worker starts until the scheduler start path is explicitly called.

goals.objective: Prove maker and checker execution from imported work item through the existing worker pool.
acceptance_criteria: Worker start uses existing resource-aware scheduler gates.
Maker lease artifacts, gates and trace refs link back to the source work item.
Checker verdict and evidence link back to the same loop run.

goals.objective: Close integration-origin loops into eval, reflection and optional memory candidate.
acceptance_criteria: Learning closure creates eval and reflection candidate for verified loop evidence.
Reusable lesson creates memory candidate only.
Regression creates repair work item.
No automatic durable memory promotion occurs.

goals.objective: Add Mission Control truth for the integration spine.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard shows source event through work item, goal, loop, leases, gates, eval and learning candidates.
Dashboard shows connector/capability gate status.
Dashboard shows next safe action without raw stdout inspection.

goals.objective: Run deterministic mock-runtime smoke from imported integration event to learning closure.
acceptance_criteria: Full chain completes with source event, work item, loop, leases, checker, eval and learning candidate ids.
OpenSpec validates strict.
Server tests, dashboard build, type-check and git diff check pass.
